````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),

            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

````

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

https://github.com/r0hin/re/blob/eb7c4bcacfc5030a039bea4d2d9943c984ed4da6/index.html

````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

Puis au début du `<body>` (avant `<header>`), ajoutez la navbar :

```html

                />

            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */

            transparent 1px

            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

            href="contat.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

                />

            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"

                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >

                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
                />
            </svg>

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >

                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Home</span>
        </a>

        <!-- About -->
        <a
            href="about.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >

                class="h-4 w-4"

            >

                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"

                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >

                class="h-4 w-4"

                stroke="currentColor"

                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path

                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"

                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

**Pour about.html, contat.html, page.html, service.html** (fichiers vides), voici la structure complète :

            .floating-nav {
                transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            }

            .floating-nav.hidden {
                transform: translateY(-100%);
            }
        </style>

    <body class="font-sans">

        <nav
            class="floating-nav fixed top-4 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 z-50"
        >

                class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm bg-opacity-80 dark:bg-opacity-80"
            >

                    href="index.html"

                >

                        class="h-4 w-4"
                        fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor"
                        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    >
                        <path
                            stroke-linecap="round"
                            stroke-linejoin="round"
                            stroke-width="2"
                            d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                        />
                    </svg>

                            stroke-width="2"
                            d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"

</html>

Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

Puis au début du `<body>` (avant `<header>`), ajoutez la navbar :

```html
<!-- Navbar Flottante -->
<nav class="floating-nav fixed top-4 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 z-50">
    <div
        class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm bg-opacity-80 dark:bg-opacity-80"
    >
        <!-- Home -->
        <a
            href="index.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Home</span>
        </a>

        <!-- About -->
        <a
            href="about.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Service</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Contact -->
        <a
            href="contat.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

https://github.com/hipig/tonovel-vue/blob/144af62aef9d2854867251bd8fd4a7a24dc88f83/src/components/partials/AppHeader.vue

````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

Puis au début du `<body>` (avant `<header>`), ajoutez la navbar :

```html
<!-- Navbar Flottante -->
<nav class="floating-nav fixed top-4 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 z-50">
    <div
        class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm bg-opacity-80 dark:bg-opacity-80"
    >
        <!-- Home -->
        <a
            href="index.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"

                class="h-4 w-4"

            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Home</span>
        </a>

        <!-- About -->
        <a
            href="about.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >

                class="h-4 w-4"

                    stroke-width="2"

                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >

                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"

                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >

                    stroke-linejoin="round"

                    d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Service</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Contact -->
        <a
            href="contat.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

    <style>

          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),

            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>

                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Service</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Contact -->
        <a
            href="contat.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

                transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            }

                transform: translateY(-100%);
            }

                >

                        class="h-4 w-4"
                        fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor"
                        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    >

                            d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"

      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;

          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>

          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

Puis au début du `<body>` (avant `<header>`), ajoutez la navbar :

```html
<!-- Navbar Flottante -->
<nav class="floating-nav fixed top-4 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 z-50">
    <div
        class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm bg-opacity-80 dark:bg-opacity-80"
    >
        <!-- Home -->
        <a
            href="index.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Home</span>
        </a>

        <!-- About -->
        <a
            href="about.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Service</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Contact -->
        <a
            href="contat.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

                    href="about.html"
                    class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
                >
                    <svg
                        class="h-4 w-4"
                        fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor"
                        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    >
                        <path
                            stroke-linecap="round"
                            stroke-linejoin="round"
                            stroke-width="2"
                            d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                        />

</html>

````

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Service</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Contact -->
        <a
            href="contat.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

https://github.com/sykrabadi/sykrabadi.github.io/blob/134a461427b845ed2d233a262690da49345de918/public/index.html

````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

    <div
        class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm bg-opacity-80 dark:bg-opacity-80"
    >
        <!-- Home -->
        <a
            href="index.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Home</span>
        </a>

        <!-- About -->
        <a
            href="about.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Service</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Contact -->
        <a
            href="contat.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

                transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            }

                        class="h-4 w-4"
                        fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor"
                        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    >

                            d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

https://github.com/r0hin/re/blob/eb7c4bcacfc5030a039bea4d2d9943c984ed4da6/index.html

````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

Puis au début du `<body>` (avant `<header>`), ajoutez la navbar :

```html
<!-- Navbar Flottante -->
<nav class="floating-nav fixed top-4 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 z-50">
    <div
        class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm bg-opacity-80 dark:bg-opacity-80"
    >
        <!-- Home -->
        <a
            href="index.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Home</span>
        </a>

        <!-- About -->
        <a
            href="about.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Service</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Contact -->
        <a
            href="contat.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
        >
            <svg
                class="h-4 w-4"
                fill="none"
                stroke="currentColor"
                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
            >
                <path
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"
                    d="M8 10h.01M12 10h.01M16 10h.01M9 16H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V6a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2v8a2 2 0 01-2 2h-5l-5 5v-5z"
                />
            </svg>
            <span>Contact</span>
        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

**Pour about.html, contat.html, page.html, service.html** (fichiers vides), voici la structure complète :

            >

                    href="index.html"

                >
                    <svg
                        class="h-4 w-4"
                        fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor"
                        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    >
                        <path
                            stroke-linecap="round"
                            stroke-linejoin="round"
                            stroke-width="2"
                            d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                        />
                    </svg>
                    <span>Home</span>
                </a>

                <!-- About -->

                    href="about.html"
                    class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
                >

                            stroke-width="2"

                        />

                    <span>About</span>

</html>

````
Parfait! Je vois la structure. Voici les fichiers à modifier pour ajouter la navbar partout. Malheureusement, je n'ai pas les outils d'édition de fichiers activés, donc je vais vous fournir le code exact pour chaque fichier.

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

Puis au début du `<body>` (avant `<header>`), ajoutez la navbar :

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

**Pour about.html, contat.html, page.html, service.html** (fichiers vides), voici la structure complète :

```html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="fr">
    <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8" />
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
        <title>Page Title Here</title>
        <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
        <script src="index.js"></script>
        <style>
            /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
            .floating-nav {
                transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            }

            .floating-nav.hidden {
                transform: translateY(-100%);
            }
        </style>
    </head>
    <body class="font-sans">
        <!-- Navbar Flottante -->
        <nav
            class="floating-nav fixed top-4 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 z-50"
        >
            <div
                class="flex items-center gap-4 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/20 rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg backdrop-blur-sm bg-opacity-80 dark:bg-opacity-80"
            >
                <!-- Home -->
                <a
                    href="index.html"
                    class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
                >
                    <svg
                        class="h-4 w-4"
                        fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor"
                        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    >
                        <path
                            stroke-linecap="round"
                            stroke-linejoin="round"
                            stroke-width="2"
                            d="M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6"
                        />
                    </svg>
                    <span>Home</span>
                </a>

                <!-- About -->
                <a
                    href="about.html"
                    class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
                >
                    <svg
                        class="h-4 w-4"
                        fill="none"
                        stroke="currentColor"
                        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                    >
                        <path
                            stroke-linecap="round"
                            stroke-linejoin="round"
                            stroke-width="2"
                            d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"
                        />
                    </svg>
                    <span>About</span>
                </a>
            </div>
        </nav>
    </body>
</html>
```

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

    });
</script>

            href="about.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"

                />
            </svg>
            <span>About</span>
        </a>

        <!-- Service -->
        <a
            href="service.html"
            class="flex items-center gap-2 text-neutral-700 dark:text-white hover:text-neutral-900 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"

            >

                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                    stroke-width="2"

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),

            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>

<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>

</script>

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````

```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

---

        </a>
    </div>
</nav>
```

Et en fin de `<body>` (avant `</body>`), ajoutez le JavaScript :

```html
<!-- Script pour gérer la navbar au scroll -->
<script>
    let lastScrollTop = 0;
    const navbar = document.querySelector(".floating-nav");

    window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
        const scrollTop =
            window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

        if (scrollTop > lastScrollTop && scrollTop > 100) {
            // Scroll vers le bas
            navbar.classList.add("hidden");
        } else {
            // Scroll vers le haut
            navbar.classList.remove("hidden");
        }

        lastScrollTop = scrollTop;
    });
</script>
```

**Pour index.html**, ajoutez le CSS et la navbar au `<head>` et `<body>` :

Après la ligne `<script src="index.js"></script>`, ajoutez ce style dans le `<head>` :

```html
    <style>
      /* Styles additionnels pour les icônes et effets */
      .bg-grid-black\/\[0\.1\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
          linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      .dark .bg-grid-white\/\[0\.2\] {
        background-image:
          linear-gradient(
            to right,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          ),
          linear-gradient(
            to bottom,
            rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 1px,
            transparent 1px
          );
        background-size: 40px 40px;
      }

      /* Animation pour la navbar flottante */
      .floating-nav {
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
      }

      .floating-nav.hidden {
        transform: translateY(-100%);
      }
    </style>
````
